metaTitle: Pocket Telemetry App Guide and Privacy Policy
title: A personal record of what your iPhone observes.
intro: Pocket Telemetry helps you keep a private timeline of useful signals from your iPhone, such as location, battery state, and health data you choose to allow. You can review the records on device, export them, or sync them to your own destination.

highlights.title: You choose what is recorded
highlights.body: The app asks for iOS permissions only when a feature needs them, and you can turn permissions off in iOS Settings or Apple Health.

highlights.title: Useful for a personal timeline
highlights.body: Pocket Telemetry is made for personal context, automation, experiments, and review. It is not a medical product or diagnosis tool.

highlights.title: Sync is optional
highlights.body: Nothing is sent just because the app is installed. Uploads happen only after you configure a destination and enable sync.

featuresTitle: Record the signals that matter to you
featuresIntro: Pocket Telemetry focuses on a few practical data sources instead of trying to become a full health dashboard.

featureCards.title: Location history
featureCards.body: Save location points so you can reconstruct movement, places visited, or time spent in different areas.

featureCards.title: Device state
featureCards.body: Track simple phone conditions such as battery level, charging state, Low Power Mode, and thermal state.

featureCards.title: Health data you allow
featureCards.body: Read selected Apple Health data only after you grant permission. You decide which health categories are available to the app.

featureCards.title: Export and review
featureCards.body: Inspect records in the app and export data when you want to analyze it elsewhere or keep your own archive.

syncTitle: Automatic when you want it, quiet when you do not
syncIntro: Auto Sync is designed for personal workflows where the phone records data during the day and sends it later to a destination you control.

syncSteps.title: Choose a destination
syncSteps.body: Add your sync URL and token if your server requires one. This can be a personal server, a test collector, or another private endpoint.

syncSteps.title: Pick a rhythm
syncSteps.body: Use manual sync when you want full control, or choose hourly or daily sync for routine background uploads.

syncSteps.title: Network can fail safely
syncSteps.body: If the phone is offline or a request fails, the app keeps local records available so a later sync can try again.

dataIntro: The app keeps data in practical categories. Exact fields may evolve, but the intent stays the same: make personal records readable, exportable, and syncable.

dataCards.title: Location
dataCards.body: Time, latitude and longitude, accuracy, altitude when available, and movement-related values reported by iOS.

dataCards.title: Battery
dataCards.body: Battery percentage, charging status, Low Power Mode, and basic thermal condition.

dataCards.title: Health
dataCards.body: Health categories you explicitly authorize through Apple Health permissions.

dataCards.title: Sync batches
dataCards.body: When sync is enabled, selected records are grouped into upload batches so your destination can receive them consistently.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body: Pocket Telemetry handles sensitive personal data, so the policy is simple: the app records only what you enable, keeps data under your control, and does not use your data for advertising or tracking.
items: Permissions: the app may request Location, Background Location, and Apple Health permissions for the features you enable. You can revoke permissions at any time in iOS Settings or the Health app.
Health data: Pocket Telemetry reads Apple Health data only after your authorization. It does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, treatment, prevention, or emergency monitoring.
On-device data: records and settings may remain on your iPhone until you clear them, reset the app, delete the app, or erase the device.
Exports: exported files are saved where you choose. If you move them to iCloud Drive or another service, that destination handles the file under its own rules.
Sync destinations: when you configure a sync destination, selected data is sent there at your direction. Only use destinations you trust.
No ads or data sale: Pocket Telemetry does not sell, rent, trade, or use your location, health, or device records for advertising or cross-app tracking.
Children: Pocket Telemetry is not directed to children under 13.
Contact: for privacy questions, contact keith.dh@hotmail.com.

footer: This page may be updated as Pocket Telemetry changes.
